Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Abidan Court]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Abidan Court operates in the name of order among the worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Suriel is the Sixth Judge of the Abidan Court.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Suriel is a member of the Abidan Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Schisms occur within the Court of Seven.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Abidan Court is a group that includes Judges like Suriel.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Abidan Court only has three Worldseeds.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Abidan Court is where the Judges are located.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Abidan Court consists of seven Judges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Ozriel will be tried in the Abidan Court.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
